qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Flask debug mode enabled by default in web_app allows remote code execution via Werkzeug debugger
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Same Unfurl Flask debug-control path: web_app obtains a debug value from config/default handling and UnfurlApp passes it into app.run(debug=...), exposing the Werkzeug debugger when debug should be disabled.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded zlib decompression in parse_compressed.py enables denial of service via crafted URL
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different root cause and vulnerable code: this finding concerns parse_compressed.py zlib.decompress() resource exhaustion, not app.py debug config parsing or Werkzeug debugger exposure.

selected_finding.title: Flask debug mode enabled by default in web_app allows remote code execution via Werkzeug debugger

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The selected finding identifies the same app.py debug-value flow that the advisory describes, and the copied PoC demonstrated the advisory impact: with unfurl.ini setting debug = False on the advisory-vulnerable parent commit, Flask still ran with Werkzeug debug mode enabled and exposed the debugger console.
evidence: Advisory describes web_app reading debug from UNFURL_APP config as a string/default and UnfurlApp passing it to app.run(debug=...), making debug mode truthy.
flask-debug-rce/vulnerability_report.json cites app.py debug defaults and app.run(debug=unfurl_debug) as the vulnerable operation exposing the Werkzeug debugger.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_930f69b4/.judge/poc_runs/flask-debug-rce/run.log: local fallback checked out advisory-vulnerable commit 6b8e97853090c909936a18d41228168b7a35fe94, launched Unfurl with unfurl.ini debug = False, and completed successfully.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_930f69b4/.judge/poc_runs/flask-debug-rce/evidence/debug_false_evidence.json: configured_debug_value=False, server_ready=true, console_status=200, console_has_werkzeug=true, and success=true.

/Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_930f69b4/.judge/poc_runs/flask-debug-rce/evidence/server_runtime.log: Flask logged "Debug mode: on", "Debugger is active", and "Debugger PIN" while serving /console with HTTP 200.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC checked out the advisory-vulnerable parent commit, started Unfurl with unfurl.ini containing debug = False, and still observed Flask Debug mode: on, Werkzeug Debugger is active, a Debugger PIN, and GET /console returning HTTP 200 with the Werkzeug debugger UI.
